methodologyNotes: Labels reflect public evidence available on 2026-07-02. Ad-delivery status drifts over time; re-check evidence links if collection happens more than ~2 weeks later.

Pre-spike probe finding: a server-side (logged-out, datacenter-IP) fetch of the watch page returns a player response with exactly one generic preroll adPlacement and empty adSlots for EVERY video tested (including certain-green MrBeast and made-for-kids Cocomelon). The full ad decision (midrolls, adSlots) only materializes in a real browser context - which is exactly what this spike measures.

confidence=high labels are backed by direct public statements or externally verifiable facts. confidence=medium/low entries are discovery cases: include them in collection, but EXCLUDE them from threshold calibration in RESULTS.md unless corroborated by the measurements themselves.
yellow does NOT mean zero ads (SPEC 1.1): expect sporadic/reduced delivery, possibly missing midrolls on midroll-eligible durations.
If the project owner has own videos with a known Studio icon, add them to ownVideos below: they are the only ground-truth-grade labels available.

videos.title: Bunker dei miliardari: da cosa vogliono salvarsi?
videos.note: Italian brand-safe science major (relevant for the IT ad market). Published the day the dataset was built - if visited within 24h of upload, ad review may not have settled.

videos.title: La famiglia che non sapevi di avere: donazione di gameti e DNA
videos.note: Italian brand-safe science major, 19 min.

videos.title: Uncovering the Secret Lives of Forest Elephants
videos.note: Nature documentary major, 21 min.

videos.title: Heroin and Crack Addict-Cassandra
videos.note: Addiction-topic interview. Creator Mark Laita has publicly and repeatedly stated that addiction/sex-work interviews on this channel are systematically demonetized (drove him to paywall content).

videos.title: Straight Guy Doing Gay Porn-Cole Church
videos.note: Sex-work-topic interview - the exact category the public petition describes as demonetized en masse (453 videos in the playlist).

videos.title: Sellin' Dope-Laquita
videos.note: Drug-topic interview, 8:21 - just over the 8-min midroll threshold, useful boundary case.

videos.title: Groomed-A Male Model's Story-Buddy Krueger
videos.note: Abuse-topic interview; same channel-level evidence, but topic slightly outside the explicitly named demonetized playlists.

videos.title: US CENTCOM Commander Provides Updates on EPIC FURY - Iran
videos.note: War/combat-footage channel with long-documented monetization restrictions on YouTube (the channel built funker530.com largely in response). 8:52, midroll-eligible. Current-conflict coverage (Iran strikes) also hits the 'sensitive events' advertiser guideline.

videos.title: US Strike Compilation vs Iran: Operation Epic Fury
videos.note: Graphic combat footage of an ongoing conflict, 5:50 (below midroll eligibility - expect preroll-only even if monetized).

videos.title: IL FIENILE DEGLI ORRORI
videos.note: Italian true-crime major (brutal murder case, 56 min). Topic category is advertiser-unfriendly per YouTube's guidelines and the creator has discussed monetization limits in interviews, but no per-video public confirmation found. Discovery case: EXCLUDE from calibration unless measurements corroborate.

videos.title: Scary Movie | Official Red Band Trailer (2026)
videos.note: Verified age-restricted (playabilityStatus=LOGIN_REQUIRED, 'Sign in to confirm your age', isFamilySafe=false). Logged-out pass should yield UNAVAILABLE; logged-in adult pass tests limited delivery on age-restricted content.

videos.title: Baby Shark Rainbow - Learn Colors and Sea Creatures
videos.note: Made-for-kids designation: ads limited by design (no personalized ads), not by content review.

videos.title: My First Vlog 2026
videos.note: Channel has 82 subscribers (verified 2026-07-02) - far below YPP thresholds, so certainly not in the Partner Program. Tests whether YouTube serves ads on non-YPP content (SPEC 1.1 says it may, keeping all revenue).

videos.title: SpaceX Starship test flight: full stream
videos.note: Live-stream VOD (isLiveContent=true) from a major news channel, ~97 min. Tests placement structure on live VODs. No need to watch it all: preroll + a few midroll seeks.

videos.title: Baby Iguana vs Racer Snakes | 20 Years of Planet Earth
videos.note: Certain-green content BELOW the 8-min midroll threshold (4:28): the classifier must not penalize missing midrolls here.

videos.title: I Got Demonetized. This Is The End.
videos.note: Creator states in this very video (2026-04-15) that the channel was demonetized. Channel-level YPP removal, not a per-video yellow icon; status may have been restored since April. Discovery case for 'channel outside YPP' delivery.

videos.title: My cat channel got demonetized
videos.note: Video description states: channel demonetized April 2026 for 'inauthentic content', appeal rejected. Confirmed channel-level removal, recent, unresolved. 2:34 long.
